decision: Use PHP XMLReader for streaming WXR parsing
evidence_summary: WP core's importer uses XMLReader for large files; WXR exports >100MB common; SimpleXML/DOM eager loading exceeds memory bounds for medium-large sites
WXR has been stable since WP 3.0 (2010 v1.2); real-world exports overwhelmingly v1.2; older versions appear in legacy archives
WP exports from plugin-heavy sites have malformed entries with surprising frequency (broken oEmbeds
recorded_at: truncated serialized PHP); operator preference is finish-with-summary

decision: Five source plugins matching WXR sectioning
evidence_summary: WXR's natural grouping (wp:author / wp:term / item-with-post_type discriminator) maps 1:1 with M-002's per-source model; aligns with Drupal contrib's structure

decision: Single PostSource with downstream post_type filter (no per-CPT plugins)
evidence_summary: CPT proliferation (sites with 20+ CPTs) would force combinatorial source plugin explosion; M-002 process maps already support per-record filtering

decision: Idempotent media copy via target-existence + size check
evidence_summary: M-002 substrate's id-map only deduplicates entity records; media files live outside its purview so the source plugin owns idempotency

decision: Default oEmbed resolution to opt-in (resolve_remote: false)
evidence_summary: Network calls during migration slow imports / surprise air-gapped operators / leak migration-time IPs; expanded metadata is a polish-pass concern

decision: Discard WP password hashes; force first-login reset
evidence_summary: WP bcrypt with WP-specific cost differs from typical Waaseyaa configs; partial state without session salts is incomplete; clean-slate reset avoids unpredictable issues

decision: Reuse M-002 LookupProcessor for cross-migration ID resolution
evidence_summary: M-002 substrate FR-027..FR-035 explicitly provides this primitive; no need to reimplement
ADR 012a names the package as separate; alpha.178 incident showed monorepo split-fan-out friction; clear ownership and independent release cadence beat unified versioning

decision: Independent semver versioning with framework compat range
evidence_summary: Coupled versions punish both surfaces; Composer's caret-range mechanism handles compat declaration cleanly

decision: Ship wp_posts_to_articles as documented example (not template)
evidence_summary: Working examples are more usable than abstract templates; consumers without an articles entity rename the migration; consumers with one get a working default
Lossy migration transforms are hard to debug post-hoc; preserving the field lets consumers reconstruct threading if their engagement entity supports it

decision: Treat unknown WXR namespaces as opaque pass-through (_extra field)
evidence_summary: WooCommerce/Yoast/etc inject custom XML namespaces; failing on unknown elements would block real-world exports; opaque preservation lets consumers extract via custom process plugins
